examples: With a sense of blame, he heard rustling, foil sighs, and a monotonous hiss from pouring wine into the glass.
It's monotonous work, like most factory jobs.
Aircraft passed overhead with monotonous regularity.
"We set up Berisik.com because mainstream music in Indonesia is so monotonous, " said co-founder Mahdesi.
There has been a monotonous array of touch-screen mono-blocks of the same screen size.
